headline: Wells Fargo’s FiNet Recruits Advisory Teams from UBS, Commonwealth, and Stifel
summary: Following the independent channel’s 25th birthday, Wells Fargo announces three recruiting wins that total $1.2 billion in client assets.

headline: Wells Fargo WFUSD Stablecoin Filing Meets Weak Share Momentum And Valuation
summary: Wells Fargo has filed a trademark application for "WFUSD," a proposed stablecoin linked to the bank's crypto and blockchain ambitions. The filing hints at potential uses in payment processing, digital asset trading, or tokenization services for clients. The move places Wells Fargo alongside other major US banks exploring blockchain based products. Wells Fargo (NYSE: WFC) is exploring deeper involvement in digital assets at a time when its share price is $75.75. The stock has declined 3.9%...

headline: 11 Investment Must Reads for This Week (March 17, 2026)
summary: The ramifications from the war in Iran continue to trickle through markets, forcing managers to assess investment decisions. Concerns about private credit continue to mount. These are among the investment must reads for advisors for this week.

headline: Wells Fargo Initiates Netflix (NFLX) with Equal Weight Rating Amid Global Content Strategy

headline: Evercore ISI Lowers PT on Wells Fargo (WFC) Keeps a Buy Rating
summary: Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) is one of the Most Undervalued Long Term Stocks to Buy According to Analysts. On March 6, Evercore ISI reiterated a Buy rating on Wells Fargo & Company (NYSE:WFC) but lowered the price target from $105 to $98. ​The rating is based on the firm’s meeting with the management in […]
